creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 162888
upgrade for security/gnupg

https://lists.gnupg.org/pipermail/gnupg-announce/2015q4/000380.html

GnuPG 2.1.9 contains several bugfixes and enhancements, including:
"* agent: Fix a regression in ssh-add-ing Ed25519 keys." which seems related to #204295 .

Upgrade (see attached patch) is almost drop-in, there's a new dirmngr-conf.skel sample config file.
